features: Holds Large Gifts - This extra-large 44×33×14cm kraft gift box with lid provides generous room for bulky items such as holiday party sets, ceremony kits, winter coats, large handbags, tall boots, bedding sets, wine bundles, or gourmet hampers. Its spacious design makes it an ideal gift box for presents for weddings, anniversaries, birthdays, Christmas, and other celebrations. As a large gift box with lid, it elevates gift-giving for any occasion.

20kg Strong & Durable - Crafted from approximately 2mm (1200g/m²) premium kraft paperboard, this foldable box with lid is much stronger than typical 300g disposable boxes. The reinforced lid, sides, and base support up to 20kg without bending or tearing, ensuring safe carrying and long-term use as a reusable gift box or sturdy storage box.

10s Assembly, No Tape - Shipped flat for convenience, the box features a smart fold-back structure and four hidden magnets, allowing quick assembly in about 10 seconds with no tape or glue required. This foldable box with lid can be collapsed and rebuilt repeatedly, helping you save valuable storage space while keeping packaging clean and effortless.

Understated, Elevated Design - The clean kraft-paper exterior is paired with a 4cm-wide, 330cm-long ivory ruffled ribbon for a refined finishing touch. Its timeless, minimalist look enhances any gift, making even simple items feel premium without appearing overly flashy—perfect for a kraft gift box with lid designed for modern, elegant presentation.

Tekhoho Quality Guarantee - Each Tekhoho box is reinforced at the corners and individually wrapped in protective film to ensure it arrives in flawless condition. Offered in multiple sizes and colors, this large gift box with lid is supported by a 30-day refund guarantee and responsive customer service for a confident buying experience.
description: From the brand Previous page "People don't buy what you do,they buy why you do it." One thing TEKHOHO founders considered when creating this gift box: REUSABLE. We didn't want our gift box to go to the trash once you take out the gift, it should be an elegant box that can be reused. Next page
